prestazioni: AMS Performance Alpha-N ECU calibration for the M297 6.0L V12 (750+ HP, 710 Nm torque) with bespoke fuel mapping for 102-octane race fuel, eliminating factory torque limiters and optimizing throttle response via Motec M150 standalone management with individual cylinder trimming

Garrett GT4202R ball-bearing turbochargers (84mm compressor, 76mm turbine) with TiAL MV-R 44mm wastegates and custom 3.5" stainless steel equal-length exhaust manifolds by Capristo, paired with a secondary air injection system to reduce turbo lag below 3,500 RPM

Öhlins TTX40 4-way adjustable coilovers with 12-position rebound damping and 20-position compression damping, featuring Pagani-specific spring rates (18kg/mm front, 22kg/mm rear) and spherical bearing top mounts by Radium Engineering for track-focused alignment (-3.5° front camber, -2.8° rear camber)
estetica: Full carbon-fiber bodywork replacement with a custom 3D-scanned aero package by Novitec Torado, including a 2,200mm front splitter with integrated NACA ducts for brake cooling and a 1,800mm rear diffuser with active Gurney flaps (adjustable via cockpit switch)

Brembo GT-R monobloc calipers (6-piston front, 4-piston rear) with 410mm x 38mm carbon-ceramic rotors (CCM-R compound) and Pagani-specific brake ducts by AP Racing, finished in gold anodized caliper covers with laser-etched "Zonda R" script

OMP Carbon-Kevlar racing seats with 6-point Schroth Profi II harnesses, wrapped in Alcantara suede with custom embroidered Pagani crest on the headrests, paired with a suede-wrapped MOMO Prototipo steering wheel (380mm diameter) featuring a quick-release hub by NRG Innovations
